summary: BillingTab transfer-price based reconciliation tested successfully. Backend returns all new fields (total_payable_to_nyla, net_settlement, settlement_note_type, reconciled_payable_to_nyla). Frontend renders correctly with empty state showing 'No approved settlements' message.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_billing_reconciliation_transfer_price.py - New test file for transfer-price based reconciliation

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI elements verified via Playwright

seed_data_creation: No seed data created - test distributor has no approved settlements for current period
context_for_next_testing_agent: BillingTab transfer-price based reconciliation is working correctly. Backend endpoint GET /api/distributors/{id}/monthly-reconciliation returns new fields: total_payable_to_nyla, net_settlement, settlement_note_type, reconciled_payable_to_nyla. Formula verified: total_payable_to_nyla = total_billing_value - total_distributor_earnings - total_factory_adjustment. net_settlement = total_payable_to_nyla - total_credit_notes_applied - total_factory_return_credit. settlement_note_type is 'debit' when net > 0, 'credit' when net < 0, 'none' when 0. Frontend shows empty state correctly when no approved settlements exist.

verified: settlement_note_type logic: debit if net > 0, credit if net < 0, none if 0
Returns 400 when no approved unreconciled settlements exist
Uses net_settlement (transfer-price based) for note amount
Subtitle 'Distributor pays Nyla at transfer price for stock sold to customers' visible
Month/Year selectors visible with data-testid attributes
Empty state shows 'No approved settlements for {month} {year}' correctly
Base Prices & Margins note with link to Margins tab visible
Empty state message displayed when no approved settlements
Guidance text 'Generate and approve settlements from the Settlements tab first' shown
Debit/Credit Notes section shows 'No debit/credit notes yet' message

api_endpoints_tested: GET /api/distributors/{id}/monthly-reconciliation?month=X&year=Y - Returns transfer-price based reconciliation data
POST /api/distributors/{id}/generate-monthly-note - Generates debit/credit note using net_settlement

verified: Determines settlement_note_type based on net_settlement sign (line 5930)
Returns all required fields including reconciled_payable_to_nyla (line 5963)
Uses transfer-price based net_settlement for note amount (line 6015)
Settlement breakdown table with 'At Transfer Price' column (lines 359-429)
